title: FounderVoice Scribe was the missing index — anecdotes had Supabase rows but no per-Cathedral searchable tablets
observation: After K522.6 seeded 33 Master Registry anecdotes into Supabase, no Cathedral surface could answer 'find me an anecdote about persistence.' The FounderVoice Scribe had 42 entries (all rhetorical keystones) but zero anecdote-indexed tablets. K522.7 Phase C fixed this: 41 FV-ANEC-### entries added (33 complete, 2 placeholder stubs, 6 pending Founder ratification). The Cathedral can now route 'persistence stories' → [FV-ANEC-015 Kurt, FV-ANEC-017 Brakeless, FV-ANEC-016 Megamind] without a full table scan.
decision: Seed one tablet per Master Registry anecdote. Tags are the routing mechanism. supabase_id field links tablet to live row. Idempotent: checks for FV-ANEC-001 before appending.

title: Non-MASTER Registry variant is an older version — not a parallel scope split
observation: FOUNDER_ANECDOTES_REGISTRY.md (Dec 21, 2025) and FOUNDER_ANECDOTES_REGISTRY_MASTER.md (Feb 21, 2026) could have been different-scope parallel documents. Phase E determined they are not: REGISTRY.md is a proper subset (anecdotes #1-#28 only) of MASTER (#1-#35). The Feb 2026 update added #29-#35. REGISTRY.md contains zero unique content.
decision: Recommend archive-rename to FOUNDER_ANECDOTES_REGISTRY_LEGACY_DEC2025.md. Knight does not rename — Founder ratifies. Two identically-structured files with similar names is a sync-script collision risk.

title: Worksheet-not-draft is the canonical pattern for Founder-prose requirements
observation: K522.7 Phase B built a 6-entry reconciliation worksheet for anecdotes #36-#41 (Hugo-only anecdotes with no Master Registry entry). The alternative — Knight drafting Founder-voice prose — would have created 6 hallucinated anecdotes that Founder would need to overwrite (60-80% rewrite expected per feedback_drafts_as_scaffolding.md). The worksheet pre-loads existing prose from Supabase, marks blank fields [FOUNDER FILL], and includes expansion prompts for partial entries (#26, #28).
decision: Canonical pattern for all Founder-prose-gated items: WORKSHEET = scaffold + pre-loaded secondary prose + [FOUNDER FILL] markers. Codified as TS-082. Applies to: anecdote additions, ratification-required content, any text where Founder voice authenticity is load-bearing.

title: Detective Scribe second application: Cephas audit clean — embedded anecdotes are already tracked
observation: 28 Puddings, 26 Crown Letters (5 sampled), 2 Founder-category pages, 163 tidbits entries scanned for untracked Founder anecdotes. 7 pattern hits, 0 true positives. Clean result. The false-positive rate (100%) was driven by family-keyword filter (son/mother/father) being too broad for Cephas content where those words appear in letter prose and platform descriptions.
decision: Improvement for K522.8: use biographical-setting pre-filter (Montana|Tennessee|Tanzania|OCS|college|Army) before family-keyword scan. Reduces candidate set to 0 for non-narrative content. BST Episodes + Spoonfuls (0 entries at K522.7) = first priority for K522.8 re-run.

title: Six anecdote candidates (#36-#41) await Founder pass — Supabase prose pre-loaded as starting draft
observation: The Shop, Triple Double, To Blave (pre-existing Supabase ids 1-3) and USAA Lifeline, Golden Eagle, Squad Car Mannequin (Hugo-only ids 8, 11, 13) have full Supabase prose but no Master Registry entry. K522.7 Phase B worksheet pre-loaded all six. The To Blave Technique (id=3) is the richest — 1,200+ words including K521 empirical cross-validation of the 7/10 principle.
decision: Founder needs ~30 min to: confirm/revise prose for each, fill [FOUNDER FILL] metadata fields, sign off. After sign-off, Knight commits to Master Registry file and seedes FV-ANEC-036..041 as 'complete' (currently 'stub_awaiting_founder_ratification').

title: Placeholders #24 and #27 remain unfilled — oral tradition exists, prose not captured
observation: Master Registry notes that #24 (Walking Naked to Pool, 1st grade) and #27 (5-Mile Walk Home, age 4, Dar es Salaam) 'exist' and 'have been written' but the prose was not located. These are childhood memories from age 1-7, the most temporally distant. The worksheet provides fill-in templates with expansion prompts.
decision: No escalation needed — Founder knows these stories and can fill them. They are not blocking any current deployment. Flag for K522.8 if still unfilled after Founder pass.

title: Master Registry → Supabase → Hugo sync chain is now complete end-to-end
observation: After K522.6 + K522.7: Master Registry (35 entries canonical) → Supabase anecdotes table (39 rows) → Hugo anecdotes.md (39 entries, regenerated by sync script). FounderVoice Scribe (41 FV-ANEC tablets) indexes the entire set. After Founder pass → Master Registry (41 entries) → 6 new Supabase rows OR update existing → Hugo sync re-run → Cephas updated automatically. The chain is idempotent and one-directional (Master → Supabase → Hugo).
decision: Sync chain is ready. Run order after Founder pass: (1) Founder fills worksheet, (2) Knight appends to Master Registry file, (3) Knight updates Supabase (6 new INSERT or PATCH), (4) Sync script re-run, (5) Hugo build + deploy. No schema changes needed.

title: tidbits.jsonl contains 0 new 2026 Founder anecdotes — Section 4 of worksheet draws a blank
observation: 163 tidbits entries scanned for anecdote-signal keywords (anecdote, story told, childhood, when I was, one time). 0 hits. The FounderVoice Scribe pre-K522.7 (42 entries) contained biographical anchors (Montana, Christmas 1992, Jeep, $175 apartment, Cloyd Pattern) but these all cross-reference known Master Registry anecdotes, not new stories.
decision: The only known 2026 addition to the anecdote corpus is To Blave (B127, April 2026). Section 4 conclusion: no new 2026 B-session anecdotes have been captured in any canonical surface. Founder should check B127-B128 session logs for any anecdote-shaped stories told to Bishop but not captured in tidbits.

title: FV-ANEC ID scheme enables per-anecdote Cathedral routing and diff tracking
observation: The FV-ANEC-### identifier scheme (FV-ANEC-001 through FV-ANEC-041) provides stable per-anecdote references across: FounderVoice Scribe tablets, synapse cross-references, Toolsmith entries, Knight reports. The master_registry_num and supabase_id fields create bidirectional links between the Cathedral layer (FounderVoice) and the data layer (Supabase). Any A&A formal filing that needs to cite a specific Founder anecdote can now use FV-ANEC-### as the stable reference.
decision: Use FV-ANEC-### as canonical cross-reference in all future A&A filings that cite Founder anecdotes. Do NOT use Supabase id (fragile to row deletion) or Master Registry # alone (not tied to Cathedral).

title: K522.8 scope crystallized: Drink Cookbook Pudding + BST Episodes + Spoonful categories
observation: K522.7 Phase D audit surfaced three K522.8 candidates: (1) The Drink Cookbook Pudding (Jones family heirloom cookbook story — truncated in Supabase, potentially a full anecdote); (2) BST Episodes category (0 entries at K522.7 — when populated, sweep for Founder audio/video narratives); (3) Spoonfuls category (same). These represent the next layer of the embedded-anecdote audit that K522.7 could not complete due to empty categories.
decision: K522.8 scope: (a) fetch full Drink Cookbook content, determine if anecdote-class; (b) re-run Phase D audit when BST Episodes + Spoonfuls populated; (c) sweep remaining 21 Crown Letters (only 5 sampled in K522.7); (d) verify Founder worksheet completion from K522.7.
